fix_instructions.Analytics: Check API connection and credentials in Analytics agent settings → ensure API key is valid and properly configured
fix_instructions.SEO Optimizer: Verify SEO update scripts are correctly formatted and applied → check for any syntax errors or skipped updates
fix_instructions.Video Reviewer: Check Video Reviewer agent logs for errors → ensure video review script is correctly configured and running
fix_instructions.Instagram: Instagram agent is missing INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → add it
fix_instructions.Revenue Tracker: Verify Revenue Tracker agent is correctly configured to track YouTube Partner Program (YPP) earnings
